/home/admin/effcc/bin/effcc -O3 --target=e1x -DHW_BUILD -flto -DE1_TARGET CMakeFiles/link_echo_scalar.dir/echo_main.c.o CMakeFiles/link_echo_scalar.dir/hal_e1.c.o -o scalar/link_echo  sdk/stdlib/libeff.a sdk/drivers/uart/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_uart.a sdk/drivers/pinmux/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_pinmux.a sdk/drivers/i2c/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_i2c.a sdk/drivers/gpio/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_gpio.a sdk/drivers/spi/scalar/libeff_eff_drv_spi.a
